holdings.name: TCS
holdings.description: Large-cap quality anchor. 40%+ EBITDA margin, zero debt, consistent dividend. Quality factor cornerstone across flexicap universe.

holdings.name: Infosys
holdings.description: Large-cap quality. 30%+ EBITDA margins, GenAI positioning. Consistent dividend and buyback programme.

holdings.name: HUL
holdings.description: Consumer quality across market caps. 50%+ ROCE. Unilever-parent global playbook localised for India. Low earnings variability.

holdings.name: Bajaj Finance
holdings.description: Mid-large NBFC with quality profile — 20%+ ROE, proprietary credit models, 400M+ customer dataset.

holdings.name: Asian Paints
holdings.description: Duopoly paints quality. 60%+ gross margins, asset-light distribution. Quality-factor perennial inclusion across flexicap universe.

holdings.name: Persistent Systems
holdings.description: Mid-cap quality IT. Highest revenue growth in sector with consistent ROCE improvement. Flexicap bridge from mid to large quality.

holdings.name: Varun Beverages
holdings.description: PepsiCo bottler with highest-quality mid-cap composite score. Geographic franchise expansion driving earnings with high ROCE.

holdings.name: Titan Company
holdings.description: Premium consumer brands — watches, jewellery, eyewear. 25%+ ROCE, Tata Group governance. Quality perennial across market cap bands.

holdings.name: Nestle India
holdings.description: Large-cap quality FMCG. Maggi duopoly, 60%+ ROCE, zero debt. Most quality-consistent brand in Nifty 500 universe.

holdings.name: Coforge
holdings.description: Mid-cap IT quality. BFSI-focused deal wins, low leverage, improving margins. Flexicap quality bridge.
